evidence_label: recipient source privacy gate, not contact permission or treatment advice
public_allowed_fields: source bundle reference, not raw candidate URL
cost, timeline, ethics, biosafety, and material-constraint labels
private_only_fields: people names, emails, phone numbers, and addresses
patient records, identifiers, or sample identifiers
prices, scheduling details, business terms, purchase, import, or procurement scope
decision_rule: A public recipient evidence card can cite a private source-bundle reference and capability labels. It must not publish raw source URLs or details that identify a real candidate recipient.
